doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_mpn_cmpzero (mpfr/src/div.c L648-L656). Returns 1 if the limb array {ap, an} is non-zero, 0 if all limbs are zero. C iterates from the high end down (likely-non-zero short-circuit). The TS port: check if any limb is non-zero (bigint OR-fold, or array.some(!== 0n)). Class 'arithmetic'.
c_signature: static int mpfr_mpn_cmpzero(mpfr_limb_ptr ap, mp_size_t an)
divergence_from_c: C: returns 1/0 as int; TS: returns 1/0 as number (or boolean, but matching C's int convention here for parity). C takes (ap, an) — array pointer + length; TS takes (ap: bigint[]) — array length implicit. Validates: each ap[i] is bigint in [0, 2^64).
refs: mpfr/src/div.c L648-L656 — the C reference body.
CLAUDE.md 'Hallucination-risk callouts: GMP mpn limbs are LITTLE-ENDIAN by limb index'.
